name: Cash in a Dash Pawn Shop
description_short: Family-owned Columbus pawn shop offering loans, purchases, and sales of electronics, jewelry, instruments, and guns since 1996.
description_long:
Cash In A Dash Pawn Shop is a family-owned and operated business located in Columbus, Ohio that has been serving the community for over 16 years, having been established in 1996. The shop operates from their location at 1973 Morse Rd, Columbus, OH 43229, and maintains an active pawn license (PB #: PB.100351.000) with the state of Ohio.

The company offers a full range of pawn shop services including pawn loans, cash purchases of items, retail sales, and general pawn transactions. Their inventory categories include electronics, jewelry, musical instruments, and firearms. They market themselves as maintaining competitive pricing based on current market rates for precious metals like gold and silver, as well as fair valuations for instruments and other collateral items.

Cash In A Dash differentiates itself through several factors: they emphasize their family ownership and long-term presence in the market, advertise a large and diverse inventory selection, claim to stay current with market pricing for commodities and specialty items, and notably offer Sunday hours (unusual for many pawn shops). Customer testimonials on their website highlight positive experiences with staff kindness and service quality.

As a traditional pawn shop, this business serves customers seeking quick cash through collateral-based lending or those looking to buy pre-owned items at discounted prices. However, like all pawn loans, borrowers should understand that failure to reclaim pawned items results in permanent loss of those goods, and pawn loans typically carry high effective interest rates despite not being classified as traditional loans. The lack of detailed fee structures or loan terms on their website means customers would need to contact them directly to understand their specific rates and conditions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned business with 16+ years of continuous operation since 1996
Claims to maintain current market pricing for gold, silver, and instruments
Diverse inventory across multiple categories (electronics, jewelry, instruments, guns)
Open on Sundays, providing weekend access when many competitors are closed
Licensed pawn operation (PB #: PB.100351.000) operating legally in Ohio
Advertises large selection and positions as one-stop shop for both buyers and sellers
Positive customer testimonials highlighting staff kindness and service quality
cons: Website provides no specific information about interest rates, fees, or loan terms
No details on loan repayment periods, what items qualify, or loan-to-value ratios
Limited online presence—no social media links, reviews aggregation, or hours confirmation beyond 'open Sunday'
Pawn loans carry inherently high effective interest rates and risk of permanent item loss
Website lacks accessibility detail despite AudioEye optimization claim; unclear if fully compliant
best_for: Consumers needing quick cash and willing to use personal items as collateral
Bargain hunters seeking discounted electronics, jewelry, or musical instruments
Gun owners or enthusiasts looking to buy, sell, or pawn firearms locally
People seeking weekend/Sunday pawn shop access in the Columbus area
diagnosis: Cash In A Dash is best for Columbus-area consumers needing quick cash via collateral-based lending or those seeking discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, or instruments. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high effective interest rates and risk permanent loss of pawned items if not repaid; customers should contact them directly for specific rate and fee information before pawning valuables.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
